channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New York AG Letitia James says Border Patrol account of migrant death in Buffalo 'unreliable'
item.description: New York Attorney General Letitia James questioned the Border Patrol's version of events that led up to the death of a migrant in the state late last ...

item.title: White House shrugs off report of Russia helping Iran to target U.S. forces in Middle East
item.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt brushed off reports that Russia is providing Iran with intelligence to attack American forces in the Midd...

item.title: Blue State Failure Is Destroying Federalism And The Constitution
item.description: Washington, D.C., is now in charge of making sure that dogs in Los Angeles aren't mistreated.

item.title: Trump administration unveils $20B reinsurance program to help maritime traffic in Middle East
item.description: The Trump administration is rolling out a $20 billion reinsurance program for ships that are worried about incurring losses due to the U.S.-Israeli on...

item.title: Lawmakers urging FISA reforms likely to face familiar pushback
item.description: A bipartisan group of lawmakers hopes to persuade the White House to support legislation that provides greater transparency and safeguards against pri...

item.title: Applying Iraqâs Hardest Lessons to Iran
item.description: While Iran is not Iraq 2.0, it requires a disciplined approach and a clear plan for the future.

item.title: Why Islam Seeks Shelter Under The Banner Of The Left
item.description: Islam is not a decorative addition to the progressive cause; it is on the verge of becoming its animating spirit.

item.title: The Paramount Purchase Could Revive American Excellence In Hollywood
item.description: Paramount CEO David Ellison understands that pro-American films and television are worth investing in.

item.title: Hamit Coskunâs Victories and Losses
item.description: The man who burned a Koran in England won the most recent appeal. But the decision is not a win for free expression.

item.title: Noem Out
item.description: The former South Dakota governor was never well suited to the job.

item.title: The Week: Trump Goes to War
Marjorie Taylor Greene says Tucker Carlson could beat Trump in an election
item.description: Former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene is throwing her support behind Tucker Carlson for president after President Trump said the conservative commentator...

item.title: Kristi Noem Rides off into the Sunset
item.description: The ousted DHS secretary took a serious role and made it like something out of Veep .
